title: Need help to set up CRM on Monday.com
excerpt:
Hi, Need to hire an expert to set up CRM on Monday.com. We also need to intergrate part of the CRM into our partner portal so that our patrner can be informed of the leads status. 
Thanks 
David

posts.author: Tianjinwawa123 (David)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Check out the team from https://www.omnitas.se/. They have some really helpful videos on YouTube and can also do custom CRM setups.

@Thomas-Omnitas

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @TheOtherPM !
@Tianjinwawa123 feel free to book a free initial session with me to talk about your needs. I’m sure we can help you out!

Cheers

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Tianjinwawa123 the guys at Omnitas are great!

I also have experience setting up CRM solutions for companies, and integrating into 3rd party systems. I’d be happy to discuss your use-case and see if we are a good fit to work together!

Here is a link you can schedule some time to discuss: Calendly - Tim Little

Best Regards,
Tim

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there @Tianjinwawa123

Welcome to the monday.com community! There’s some amazing partners within the community and I’m happy to throw my hat into the ring as well. CarbonWeb has been partnering with companies to setup their ideal workflows component-by-compnent and have extensive work developing complex CRMs.

If you’d like to grab some time with me and my team please schedule here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get your monday going!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website

posts.author: Cleopatra-upstream (Cleopatra Luneburg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Tianjinwawa123
We have been partnered with monday.com since 2017.
We specialise in helping teams maximise the power of their monday account, as well as building custom integrations, range of various workflows and app to make them even more powerful.
If you want to send me an email here or book in a session here.
It would be a pleasure to assist you and help you and your team achieve the most out of monday.com
